title: Course Journey
description: A structured teaching template for lessons, concepts, chapters, diagrams, examples, and memorable takeaways.

source.name: iPolloWork · HyperFrames
source.attribution: Original iPolloWork composition inspired by HyperFrames faceless explainer and flowchart patterns.

applyChecklist: Replace the lesson title, definition, example, and takeaway with real teaching content.
Keep the bottom caption-safe band clear and reveal the diagram only when it is explained.
Use the progress rail to make the lesson arc obvious without adding extra UI chrome.
Verify contrast and reading time for every concept label.
